title: Structured Discovery Engine Input Schema
description: Input contract for Structured Discovery Engine (SDE) v0.1. Defines the minimum and optional fields accepted before discovery question generation begins.

sde_version.description: Schema version for the Structured Discovery Engine input contract.

input_id.description: Unique identifier for the intake object being processed by SDE.

problem_description.description: Raw human-provided description of the situation, project, workflow idea, need, or problem to be clarified.

business_context.description: Optional business or organizational context that helps frame the discovery questions.

domain.description: Optional domain hint such as operations, legal, sales, HR, compliance, product, or finance.

stakeholders.description: Optional list of known stakeholders, user groups, or decision-makers relevant to the problem.

known_constraints.description: Optional list of known limits, restrictions, policies, budgets, timelines, tooling, or environmental constraints.

desired_output_type.description: Optional hint about the intended discovery output posture.

desired_outcome.description: Optional statement of the outcome the requester hopes to achieve.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes, context, or operator comments.

source_metadata.description: Optional metadata about where the intake came from.

source_type.description: Origin type of the intake object.

source_ref.description: Optional source reference such as message id, document id, or ticket id.
